data.content: Implementation review outcome: parent returned to ready_for_implementation because not all child reviews passed. Approved children: foolery-3465, foolery-d961, foolery-26e7. Rejected children: 1. foolery-e382: scope refinement defaults to enabled and falls back to a generic agent command when unconfigured, creating unexpected automatic agent execution. 2. foolery-47a2: POST /api/beats always triggers that unsafe refinement path after create, and the route contract is untested. 3. foolery-681b: the worker test file breaks bunx tsc --noEmit, failed jobs are dropped after dequeue, and agent-level result errors are not handled robustly. 4. foolery-1061: completion notifications do not invalidate the open beat-detail query, so refined beats can remain stale in the detail panel; endpoint/hook coverage is also missing.
